verdicts.rationale: Lines 1-27 show MIT license header with Copyright notice. Lines 152992-152996 show INTERFACE lif_abapmerge_marker with constants c_merge_timestamp and c_abapmerge_version matching claimed values: version 0.16.8, timestamp 2026-07-01T10:45:14.302Z.
Lines 7261-7266 show INTERFACE zif_abapgit_version with CONSTANTS c_abap_version TYPE string VALUE '1.133.0' - exactly as claimed.
Verified with regex patterns: CLASS ... DEFINITION DEFERRED = 511; CLASS ... IMPLEMENTATION = 516; INTERFACE ... DEFERRED = 113; ENDINTERFACE = 114. All counts match the claim exactly.
Exact FORM matches: password_popup at 152559, run at 152802, open_gui at 152822, output at 152850, exit at 152878, adjust_toolbar at 152904. Exactly 6 FORM routines claimed and verified.

Lines 152966-152972 show INITIALIZATION with PERFORM adjust_toolbar USING '1001' and lcl_password_dialog=>on_screen_init( ), followed by START-OF-SELECTION with PERFORM run. Control flow matches claim exactly.

Lines 152822-152846 show FORM open_gui with: IF sy-batch = abap_true calls zcl_abapgit_background=>run(); ELSE: GET PARAMETER ID 'DBT' FIELD lv_mode, CASE on 'ZABAPGIT'/'OTHERS' branches, then zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_gui()->go_home(lv_action) and CALL SELECTION-SCREEN 1001. All control flow branches match claim.
Lines 152376-152378 show SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 1001...END OF SCREEN 1001 with no parameters, only comment '* dummy for triggering screen on Java SAP GUI'. Empty screen confirmed.

Lines 152488-152510 show on_screen_output METHOD with LOOP AT SCREEN setting screen-input='0' for P_URL/P_CMNT. Lines 152527-152543 show on_screen_event METHOD with CASE iv_ucomm: WHEN 'OK' sets gv_confirm=abap_true and LEAVE TO SCREEN 0; WHEN OTHERS sets gv_confirm=abap_false and LEAVE TO SCREEN 0. All logic matches claim.

Lines 39822-39850 show ZCL_ABAPGIT_PASSWORD_DIALOG=>POPUP METHOD with TRY/CATCH of PERFORM password_popup IN PROGRAM (sy-cprog) USING iv_repo_url CHANGING cv_user cv_pass, catching cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_form. Lines 152559-152573 show FORM password_popup calling lcl_password_dialog=>popup. Both components confirmed.

Lines 152494-152510 show LOOP AT SCREEN: for P_PASS sets SCREEN-INVISIBLE='1' only; SCREEN-INPUT is NOT modified/set elsewhere in the P_PASS block, confirming field is masked (invisible but enterable) rather than hidden.

Lines 152904-152965 show FORM adjust_toolbar: calls RPY_DYNPRO_READ at line 152912 with progname=sy-cprog, dynnr=pv_dynnr; computes lv_no_toolbar from is_variant_maintenance(); calls RPY_DYNPRO_INSERT at line 152942 if header differs; error branches (sy-subrc checks at 152927 and 152961) return silently. All logic matches claim.

Line 74699 shows sy-tcode = 'SE41' ##WRITE_OK with inline comment 'evil hack, workaround to handle fixes in note 2159455' immediately before CALL FUNCTION 'RS_CUA_INTERNAL_WRITE' at line 74700. Bug candidate evidence is exact.
Grep search for 'DEFINITION FOR TESTING' returns 0 matches across the entire 152,996-line file. No ABAP Unit test classes are present.

Pattern counts verified: '^SELECT ' = 386 lines; 'CALL FUNCTION ''' = 558 statements; 'SELECT *' = 70 lines; 'COMMIT WORK' = 30 occurrences. The two inspected COMMIT WORK at lines 40797 and 40838 are both inside CATCH blocks of TRY/CATCH (not in LOOP), confirming the partial claim about these two.

Lines 92651-92655 show SELECT * FROM tadir with explicit WHERE clauses on pgmid='R3TR', object='SICF', obj_name LIKE lv_obj_name, plus pragmas ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS and #EC CI_GENBUFF. Wildcard SELECT is filtered and ATC-acknowledged.

Line 86251 shows AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'S_DEVELOP' (with fields DEVCLASS, OBJTYPE, OBJNAME, P_GROUP, ACTVT). Line 93575 shows second S_DEVELOP check. Line 98928 shows AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'S_OA2C_ADM'. Lines 152807-152810 show ZCL_ABAPGIT_AUTH=>IS_ALLOWED( ...C_AUTHORIZATION-STARTUP ) check in FORM run before any GUI logic. Authorization gates are correctly placed.

Verified IV_TCODE literals at: line 81393 = 'SMW0', line 82786 = 'SD11', line 82210 = 'SE54', line 86616 = 'SE72', line 87502 = 'SMARTFORMS', line 92633 = 'SICF', plus others listed in prompt. Pattern of multiple tcode literals passed to jump helpers is confirmed.

Lines 152574-152589 show 4 conditional exit includes with IF FOUND: zabapgit_authorizations_exit, zabapgit_user_exit, zabapgit_background_user_exit, zabapgit_gui_pages_userexit. All 4 are present in comments and INCLUDE statements as described.

Line 23336 shows DATA mo_html_viewer TYPE REF TO cl_gui_html_viewer. Lines 152850-152876 show FORM output refreshing HTML GUI via zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_gui()->set_focus(). User-facing output is HTML-based GUI, not materialized data extract.

Lines 152469-152474 show input field P_USER flowing to CHANGING parameter cv_user of LCL_PASSWORD_DIALOG=>POPUP: IF gv_confirm = abap_true. cv_user = p_user. ELSE. CLEAR cv_user. Captured only on confirmation.

Lines 152469-152476 show input field P_PASS flowing to CHANGING parameter cv_pass: IF gv_confirm = abap_true. cv_pass = p_pass. ELSE. CLEAR cv_pass. Field is then cleared again at line 152476 unconditionally (CLEAR: p_url, p_user, p_pass).
